title: QuizFile
description: One quiz file per topic. Quiz items are derived learner artifacts produced from the canonical topic record and must cite the same sources.

topic.description: Slug matching the companion topic file and curriculum.json entry.

version.description: Should be kept in sync with the topic version when questions are revised.

questions.description: Minimum 3 questions per topic for CI to pass. Target: 5–10 for published topics.

id.description: Format: {topic-slug-prefix}-{NNN} using zero-padded 3-digit integer. E.g. contracts-001, lien-003, safety-012. Prefix must be unique per topic and consistent across all questions in the file. IDs must be globally unique across all quiz files.

prompt.description: The question stem. Phrase as a complete sentence. Avoid negatives (NOT, EXCEPT) unless the tested concept specifically requires it.

choices.description: Exactly 4 answer options. Distractors should reflect realistic misconceptions, not obviously wrong answers.

answerIndex.description: 0-based index into choices[]. The correct answer.

difficulty.description: foundation: recall of a single fact. standard: application of a rule to a scenario. advanced: analysis involving multiple rules or edge cases.

explanation.description: Shown after the learner answers. Cite the specific rule, statute, or principle. Explain why the correct answer is right and why the most tempting distractor is wrong.

sourceRefs.description: IDs from sources.json that support this specific question. CI checks all IDs resolve.

tags.description: Optional labels for filtering and analytics. E.g. 'contract-formation', 'change-order', 'written-requirement'.
